children.heading: Capacity and infrastructure program
children.label: 1 Capacity and infrastructure program
children.text: The term “capacity and infrastructure program” has the meaning given the term in subsection (f)(1) of (as added by section 7511(a)(4)).section 6971 of this title1

children.heading: Capacity and infrastructure program critical base funding
children.label: 2 Capacity and infrastructure program critical base funding
children.text: The term “capacity and infrastructure program critical base funding” means the aggregate amount of Federal funds made available for capacity and infrastructure programs for fiscal year 2006, as appropriate.

children.heading: Competitive program
children.label: 3 Competitive program
children.text: The term “competitive program” has the meaning given the term in subsection (f)(1) of (as added by section 7511(a)(4)).section 6971 of this title1

children.heading: Competitive program critical base funding
children.label: 4 Competitive program critical base funding
children.text: The term “competitive program critical base funding” means the aggregate amount of Federal funds made available for competitive programs for fiscal year 2006, as appropriate.

children.heading: Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities
children.label: 5 Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities
children.text: The term “Hispanic-serving agricultural colleges and universities” has the meaning given the term in .section 3103 of this title

children.heading: NLGCA Institution
children.label: 6 NLGCA Institution
children.text: The term “NLGCA Institution” has the meaning given the term in .section 3103 of this title

children.heading: 1862 Institution; 1890 Institution; 1994 Institution
children.label: 7 1862 Institution; 1890 Institution; 1994 Institution
children.text: The terms “1862 Institution”, “1890 Institution”, and “1994 Institution” have the meanings given the terms in .section 7601 of this title
